title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
summary: Google Cloud announced new AI-driven capabilities in Cloud SQL for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server, including automated health management and fleet-wide insights. The update also highlights Database Migration Service for low-risk cloud migration and improvements in performance, availability, and security.
writeup: The video covers new AI-driven capabilities in Google Cloud SQL across MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server, with a focus on automated health management and fleet-wide insights. It also details Database Migration Service for low-risk cloud migration and improvements in performance, availability, and security. The concrete takeaways: managed databases gain automated health management and visibility across an entire fleet, and migration to Cloud SQL is positioned as low-risk through Database Migration Service.
